title: patch_apply 失敗を防ぐため patch 形式を正規化する
goal: Claude が返す patch を git apply 可能な形式へ正規化し、corrupt patch / patch does not apply による patch_apply 失敗を減らし、retry 時も適用可能性を保てるようにする
scope: unit tests for patch normalization and validation
out_of_scope: persist_session_reports 周辺の重複行問題
constraints: existing patch validation behavior outside patch formatting must not break
session-66 で修正した SyntaxError family classification must remain unchanged
report.json existing required keys must remain backward compatible
no provider files may be changed
outputs: normalized patch content compatible with git apply
reduced patch_apply failure for corrupt patch / patch does not apply patterns
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py: patch extraction, normalization, patch apply preparation, retry patch formatting only
backend/tests/test_patch_validation.py: add or update tests only for AC-68-01 to AC-68-04 coverage
.gitignore: add backend/tests/test_live_api_validation.py if not already present, for clean worktree and stable verification

completion_criteria.condition: patch content is normalized into a git apply compatible form and no longer fails immediately as corrupt patch for the covered cases
retry patch formatting remains consistent with initial patch formatting rules
tests cover missing diff header or malformed patch structure cases and assert normalization behavior
changed_files remain within allowed_changes only and unrelated classification behavior remains unchanged

review_points: 副作用なし（既存破壊なし）
merge_requirements: git diff --name-only must contain only allowed_changes files
compileall on orchestration and backend must pass
